raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> I authorized a charge of {$4500.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
XX/XX/year> I was informed that they lied about the services they could offer me. I immediately told them I would not be doing business with them, and that I wanted a refund. They said they would work on processing it. 
XX/XX/year> XXXX  XXXX XXXX processed refunded {$3600.00} of the original {$4500.00} to me. They stated that they were not going to refund {$850.00} because of the " work they had done ''. This is a lie, they provided me with nothing but wasted time and lies. I received absolutely no help or services from them. 
XX/XX/year> I opened a dispute with Citi for the remaining {$850.00} XXXX. I provided the all of the proof that the XXXX XXXX lied regarding their services, and that I received no services. 
XX/XX/year> I receive a very basic automated notice from Citi that states my dispute is resolved in favor of the merchant because " I received services ''. 
XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX, 2024 I contact Citi multiple times to have this dispute re-opened and resolved correctly. There is sufficient proof for this dispute to be resolved in my favor. The representatives I speak with transfer me to the " dispute XXXX ''. This person says they can't do anything and that we " need to wait on the investigator '' and that I " should receive a response in the next 7-10 business days ''. 
XX/XX/year> I receive another very basic automatic notice from Citi that states my dispute is resolved in favor of the merchant because " Without a valid credit slip, we are unable to intervene on your behalf with the merchant or their bank. ". 

This dispute has been ongoing for over a month. Citi doesn't seem to care about the customer. I have been a customer of theirs for many years, and have excellent credit. None of that seems to matter. They will lose a long time customer over what should have been a simple dispute to resolve.
